slides.title: Your job
slides.html: Role. You translate strategy into routed action — using the right door, artifact, and reviewer.

slides.title: Pledge
slides.html: Commit. When uncertain, verify against canon and SOT — do not guess from the newest file.

options.label: Your role is to avoid documentation and rely on chat memory.
Your role is to produce clear artifacts and correct routing under the operating model.

final_assessment.intro: Both questions must be correct to meet the bar for this two-item check.
final_assessment.passHint: Final assessment recorded. Progress saved for this browser.

options.label: The artifact matches the reviewer path and canon source.
Tuned to real lanes, customers, and proof — not generic slogans.
Only translated into another spoken language.
